---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Problem It Solves

Describe the problem or limitation this feature addresses.
e.g. "I always have to do X manually because there is no way to..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you would like. Include mockups or examples if helpful.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or links relevant to the request.
